license_verdict: AGPL/service-boundary: network copyleft; ZITADEL Cloud (SaaS) runs the same code as self-hosted; any modifications to ZITADEL itself must be released. Safe for self-hosted internal usage; API server modifications trigger copyleft. Suitable as reference/documentation; building OWN IdP from patterns (not code reuse) is the path.

license_verdict: Permissive vendor-friendly. Keycloak is Apache 2.0 — full source modification + redistribution permitted, trademark warnings only. No service-boundary restriction; can be vendored, embedded, or self-hosted without AGPL/SSPL obligation. Suitable for CuraOS own-IdM as reference architecture or feature-extraction blueprint.

Multi-protocol core: OIDC/OAuth2 (primary), SAML 2.0 (enterprise), DockerAuth, OID4VC (emerging). Distribution: Quarkus native + WildFly classic + Docker image.
